articles.title: What is content brief? A practical guide for content operators and product marketers
articles.summary: A useful content brief does more than describe a topic. It defines the standard the final page must satisfy.
articles.meta_description: A practical guide to content briefs for AI and B2B teams that need clearer standards, stronger structure, and more publishable drafts.

articles.title: What is content frame? A practical guide for B2B content teams
articles.summary: A content frame is the decision layer that tells a draft what must be persuasive, credible, and deliberately avoided.
articles.meta_description: Learn what a content frame is and how B2B teams use it to improve audience fit, structure, and publishable AI-assisted drafts.

articles.title: 内容 brief 是什么? 给 内容运营和产品营销团队 的实用指南
articles.summary: 真正有用的内容 brief, 不是只写主题, 而是先把一篇内容必须满足的标准写清楚。
articles.meta_description: 面向 AI 与 B2B 团队的内容 brief 指南, 帮你把标准、结构和发布质量前置到写作之前。

articles.title: 内容 frame 是什么? 给 B2B 内容团队 的实用指南
articles.summary: 内容 frame 就是那一层先行标准, 用来告诉草稿哪些点必须有说服力、可信度, 以及哪些表达必须避开。
articles.meta_description: 了解什么是内容 frame, 以及 B2B 团队如何用它提升受众匹配、结构质量和可发布性。
